series_metadata.series_description: Records on individuals or coorporations licensed to dispose of, pick up, render, or collect raw rendering material or transport such pursuant to ORC 953. Records include applications, inspections, licenses, suspensions, and status.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 4 year retention in office with disposal of the 5th year upon annual licensing. Dispose as Waste paper. Assuring audit by State Auditor., Paper: Wastepaper
